info.title: API Reference - Postcodes.io
info.description:
Postcodes.io is a free postcode lookup API and geocoder for the UK.

## Endpoint

All services can be accessed from the following endpoint.

```
https://api.postcodes.io
```

The API accepts GET and POST requests. POST methods use content type `application/json`.

## Responses

Each response comes with an appropriate HTTP Status code (except for JSONP requests). These include 200 for success, 400 for a bad request, 404 for not found and 500 for server error. The HTTP Status code is also included in the response body.

## Authentication

Postcodes.io does not require authentication.

externalDocs.description: More on our APIs, libraries with guides and examples

get.description:
### Postcode Data

Lookup a UK postcode against the ONS Postcode Directory (ONSPD). The response is a fully resolved record — every administrative, electoral, statistical and health geography that ONSPD ships for the postcode is returned at the top level by its human-readable name, with the equivalent GSS / official codes mirrored under the `codes` object.

The same shape is returned by `/postcodes` (bulk + search) and the reverse-geocoding endpoints. `/outcodes` returns a separate, aggregated [Outcode](#tag/Outward-Codes) shape — one row per outward code, with admin / parish / constituency arrays summarising the postcodes inside.

Returns `404` if the postcode does not exist or is not valid.

Query for a postcode either by:

- The postcode itself (with `query=`) or by,
- A geolocation (`lat=` and `lon=`).

## Query with Postcode

Submit a postcode query and receive a complete list of postcode matches and all associated postcode data. This is triggered when `query=` is supplied.

This is essentially a postcode search which prefix matches and returns postcodes in sorted order (case insensitive).

This method is space sensitive, i.e. it detects for spaces between outward and inward parts of the postcode (some examples detailed in this [issue](https://github.com/ideal-postcodes/postcodes.io/issues/44)).

The result set can either be empty or populated with up to 100 postcode entities. Either way it will always return a 200 response code.

## Query with Geolocation

Returns nearest postcodes for a given longitude and latitude. This is triggered when `lat=` and `lon=` are supplied.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits number of postcodes matches to return. Defaults to 10. Needs to be less than 100.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Geographic coordinate that specifies the east-west position of a point

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Limits number of postcodes matches to return. Defaults to 100m. Needs to be less than 2,000m.

schema.title: Widesearch
schema.description: Search up to 20km radius, but subject to a maximum of 10 results. Since lookups over a wide area can be very expensive, we've created this method to allow you choose to make the trade off between search radius and number of results. Defaults to false. When enabled, radius and limits over 10 are ignored.

schema.title: Filter
schema.description: A comma separated whitelist of attributes to be returned in the result object(s), e.g. filter=postcode,longitude,latitude. null responses will continue to return null. If no attributes match the result object, an empty object is returned

post.description:
Accepts a JSON object containing an array of postcodes. Returns a list of matching postcodes and respective available data.

Be sure to submit JSON requests setting `Content-Type` to `application/json`.

Accepts up to 100 postcodes.

### Post Data

This method requires a JSON object containing an array of postcodes to be posted, e.g.

```json
{
  "postcodes": ["PR3 0SG", "M45 6GN", "EX16 5BL"]
}
```

## Bulk Reverse Geocoding

Bulk translates geolocations into Postcodes. Accepts up to 100 geolocations.

get.description: Returns a list of postcodes geographically nearest to the specified postcode, ordered by proximity (closest first).

parameters.name: postcode
parameters.description: Valid UK postcode to use as the geographic center point for the proximity search

get.description: Returns a randomly selected postcode along with comprehensive geographic, administrative, and statistical data associated with that postcode.

parameters.name: outcode
parameters.description: Filters random postcodes by outcode. Returns null if invalid outcode.

get.description:
Lookup a terminated postcode.

If the terminated postcode exists, this API returns the year and month of termination plus its last known WGS84 coordinates. Channel Islands and Isle of Man postcodes do not carry coordinates — `longitude` and `latitude` will be `null` for those.

Returns `404` if the postcode does not exist in our database of terminated postcodes or is not valid.

Source: ONS Postcode Directory (ONSPD). Live and terminated postcodes share the same underlying table; a postcode is terminated when `date_of_termination` is set.

Lookup a Scottish postcode.

Returns Scottish Postcode Directory (SPD) data associated with the postcode. The response covers the full SPD field set: council area, electoral ward, Scottish and UK parliamentary geographies, health board, integration authority, data zone, intermediate zone, output area, locality, settlement, civil parish, island, national park, travel-to-work area, ITL/LAU, urban-rural classification, SIMD rank, ROA, census counts, and the corresponding GSS / official codes under the `codes` object.

Top-level fields hold the latest (canonical) value for each datapoint. Year-suffixed fields surface prior versions where the SPD publishes them.

Returns `404` if the postcode does not exist in SPD or is not valid.

For postcodes not in SPD but present in ONSPD (i.e. non-Scottish postcodes), a `404` is returned with the error message "Postcode exists in ONSPD but not in SPD."

Source: Scottish Postcode Directory (National Records of Scotland).

parameters.name: postcode
parameters.description: Specifies the postcode you wish to query

get.description:
Returns aggregated information for postcodes grouped by their shared outward code.

The outward code is the first half of any postcode (3-4 characters and followed by a space). E.g. `SW1A` is the outward code for `SW1A 1AA`.

parameters.name: outcode
parameters.description: Specifies the outward code you wish to query.

get.description: Submit a place query and receive a complete list of places matches and associated data.

Submit a place query and receive a complete list of place matches and associated data.

This API uses the Ordnance Survey Open Names Dataset. Places are not available for Northern Ireland.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Specifies the place you wish to query

get.description: Returns a randomly selected place from the database along with all its associated geographical and administrative data. Useful for testing or displaying sample location data.

postcode.title: Postcode
postcode.description: UK postcode format: 2-4 character outward code, a space, and a 3-character inward code (e.g., SW1A 2AA). Updated monthly from Royal Mail.

outcode.title: Outward Code
outcode.description: The first part of a postcode before the space (2-4 characters). This generally identifies the postal town or district.

incode.title: Inward Code
incode.description: The second part of a postcode after the space (always 3 characters). Helps identify specific streets or buildings within a postal area.

quality.title: Positional Quality Indicator
quality.description:
Positional Quality Indicator (1-9). Shows the status of the assigned grid reference:

* 1: Within the building of the matched address closest to the postcode mean
* 2: As for 1, except by visual inspection of Landline maps (Scotland only)
* 3: Approximate to within 50 metres
* 4: Postcode unit mean (averaged from addresses with same postcode)
* 5: Estimated by ONS using surrounding postcodes
* 6: Postcode sector mean (mainly PO Boxes)
* 8: Terminated postcode (last known ONS grid reference)
* 9: No coordinates available

eastings.title: Eastings
eastings.description: The OS grid reference easting (X-coordinate) to 1 metre resolution. Relates to the British National Grid for GB and the Irish National Grid for Northern Ireland. Will be null for Channel Islands and Isle of Man.

northings.title: Northings
northings.description: The OS grid reference northing (Y-coordinate) to 1 metre resolution. Relates to the British National Grid for GB and the Irish National Grid for Northern Ireland. Will be null for Channel Islands and Isle of Man.

country.title: Country
country.description: The UK constituent country for this postcode (England, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland, Channel Islands, or Isle of Man).

nhs_ha.title: Strategic Health Authority
nhs_ha.description: The NHS health authority area for this postcode.

admin_county.title: County
admin_county.description: The administrative county for this postcode. Null where the postcode falls outside a county-level authority (the underlying GSS code is then a pseudo such as `E99999999`, surfaced under `codes.admin_county`).

admin_district.title: District
admin_district.description: The administrative district or unitary authority for this postcode.

admin_ward.title: Ward
admin_ward.description: The electoral/administrative ward for this postcode.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: WGS84 longitude coordinate (east-west position). May be null if geolocation unavailable.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: WGS84 latitude coordinate (north-south position). May be null if geolocation unavailable.

parliamentary_constituency.title: Westminster Parliamentary Constituency
parliamentary_constituency.description: The UK Parliamentary constituency for this postcode.

european_electoral_region.title: European Electoral Region (EER)
european_electoral_region.description: The European Electoral Region for this postcode.

primary_care_trust.title: Primary Care Trust (PCT)
primary_care_trust.description: The healthcare administrative area for this postcode. Different naming conventions apply across UK regions.

region.title: Region
region.description: The regional designation for this postcode (formerly Government Office Regions or GORs).

parish.title: Parish/Community
parish.description: The civil parish (England) or community (Wales) for this postcode.

lsoa.title: Lower Layer Super Output Area
lsoa.description: 2021 Census LSOA code (smaller statistical area, typically 1,000-1,500 residents). Now points to 2021 data.

msoa.title: Middle Layer Super Output Area
msoa.description: 2021 Census MSOA code (mid-size statistical area, typically 5,000-7,000 residents). Now points to 2021 data.

ced.title: County Electoral District
ced.description: The county electoral division for English postcodes. Will be null for postcodes without a grid reference or in other UK regions.

ccg.title: Clinical Commissioning Group
ccg.description: NHS Clinical Commissioning Group responsible for planning healthcare services in England.

pfa.title: Police Force Area
pfa.description: The police force area for this postcode.

date_of_introduction.title: Date of Introduction
date_of_introduction.description: The date the postcode was introduced in YYYYMM format.

date_of_termination.title: Date of Termination
date_of_termination.description: The date the postcode was terminated in YYYYMM format. Null for live postcodes.

index_of_multiple_deprivation.title: Index of Multiple Deprivation
index_of_multiple_deprivation.description: ONS Index of Multiple Deprivation (IMD) rank for this postcode's LSOA. Lower ranks correspond to more deprived areas. England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland use independent IMD scales — values are not directly comparable across countries.

parliamentary_constituency_2024.title: Westminster Parliamentary Constituency (2024)
parliamentary_constituency_2024.description: The UK Parliamentary constituency for this postcode based on July 2024 boundaries.

senedd_constituency.title: Senedd Cymru Constituency
senedd_constituency.description: The Senedd Cymru (Welsh Parliament) constituency for this postcode. Only applicable to Welsh postcodes; null elsewhere.

senedd_constituency_no.title: Senedd Cymru Constituency Number
senedd_constituency_no.description: The Senedd Cymru (Welsh Parliament) constituency number for this postcode. Only applicable to Welsh postcodes; null elsewhere.

nhs_region.title: NHS England Region
nhs_region.description: The NHS England Region for this postcode. Only applicable to English postcodes.

ttwa.title: Travel to Work Area
ttwa.description: The Travel to Work Area for this postcode. TTWAs are areas where most people both live and work.

national_park.title: National Park
national_park.description: The National Park this postcode falls within, if any.

bua.title: Built-up Area
bua.description: The Built-up Area (2022) for this postcode. Built-up areas are land which has been 'irreversibly urbanised'.

icb.title: Integrated Care Board
icb.description: The NHS Integrated Care Board responsible for healthcare planning in this area.
icb.example: NHS North West London Integrated Care Board

cancer_alliance.title: Cancer Alliance
cancer_alliance.description: The Cancer Alliance for this postcode. Cancer Alliances bring together NHS providers and commissioners to improve cancer care.

lsoa11.title: Lower Layer Super Output Area (2011)
lsoa11.description: 2011 Census LSOA code. Alias for the 'lsoa' field. In Scotland this is the Data Zone, in Northern Ireland the Small Area.

msoa11.title: Middle Layer Super Output Area (2011)
msoa11.description: 2011 Census MSOA code. Alias for the 'msoa' field. In Scotland this is the Intermediate Zone.

lsoa21.title: Lower Layer Super Output Area (2021)
lsoa21.description: 2021 Census LSOA code. In Scotland this is the Data Zone, in Northern Ireland the Small Area.

msoa21.title: Middle Layer Super Output Area (2021)
msoa21.description: 2021 Census MSOA code. In Scotland this is the Intermediate Zone.

oa21.title: Output Area (2021)
oa21.description: 2021 Census Output Area code - the smallest census geography.

ruc11.title: Rural-Urban Classification (2011)
ruc11.description: The 2011 Census Rural-Urban Classification for this postcode.

ruc21.title: Rural-Urban Classification (2021)
ruc21.description: The 2021 Census Rural-Urban Classification for this postcode.

lep1.title: Local Enterprise Partnership (Primary)
lep1.description: The primary Local Enterprise Partnership for this postcode. LEPs are partnerships between local authorities and businesses.

lep2.title: Local Enterprise Partnership (Secondary)
lep2.description: The secondary Local Enterprise Partnership for this postcode, if it falls within overlapping LEP areas.

nuts.title: International Territorial Levels (ITL)
nuts.description:
Statistical geography code for international comparisons (formerly NUTS - Nomenclature of Units for Territorial Statistics).

As of January 2021, following Brexit, NUTS was replaced by ITL (International Territorial Levels) in the UK.
For backward compatibility, Postcodes.io continues to provide this data under the "nuts" field name.

codes.title: Administrative Codes
codes.description: Contains the GSS (Government Statistical Service) codes for administrative areas. Note: Returns 'Pseudo codes' (e.g., L99999999 for Channel Islands, M99999999 for Isle of Man, N99999999 for Northern Ireland, S99999999 for Scotland) for areas where a statutory geography does not exist. Client logic should handle these codes as 'Not Applicable' rather than treating them as valid IDs.

admin_district.title: District GSS Code
admin_district.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this administrative district.

admin_county.title: County GSS Code
admin_county.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this administrative county.

admin_ward.title: Ward GSS Code
admin_ward.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this administrative ward.

parish.title: Parish GSS Code
parish.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this parish.

ccg.title: CCG GSS Code
ccg.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Clinical Commissioning Group.

ccg_id.title: CCG ID
ccg_id.description: Short code identifier for this Clinical Commissioning Group.

ced.title: CED GSS Code
ced.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this County Electoral District.

nuts.title: ITL Code
nuts.description: Official code for this International Territorial Level area.

lau2.title: LAU2 Code
lau2.description: Local Administrative Unit level 2 code for this area.

lsoa.title: LSOA GSS Code
lsoa.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2021 Census LSOA.

msoa.title: MSOA GSS Code
msoa.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2021 Census MSOA.

pfa.title: PFA GSS Code
pfa.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Police Force Area.

parliamentary_constituency.title: Parliamentary Constituency GSS Code
parliamentary_constituency.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Parliamentary Constituency (July 2024 boundaries). Alias for codes.parliamentary_constituency_2024.

parliamentary_constituency_2024.title: Parliamentary Constituency GSS Code (2024)
parliamentary_constituency_2024.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Parliamentary Constituency based on July 2024 boundaries.

nhs_region.title: NHS Region GSS Code
nhs_region.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this NHS England Region.

national_park.title: National Park GSS Code
national_park.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this National Park.

icb.title: ICB GSS Code
icb.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Integrated Care Board.

cancer_alliance.title: Cancer Alliance GSS Code
cancer_alliance.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this Cancer Alliance.

lsoa11.title: LSOA 2011 GSS Code
lsoa11.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2011 Census LSOA. Alias for codes.lsoa.

msoa11.title: MSOA 2011 GSS Code
msoa11.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2011 Census MSOA. Alias for codes.msoa.

lsoa21.title: LSOA 2021 GSS Code
lsoa21.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2021 Census LSOA.

msoa21.title: MSOA 2021 GSS Code
msoa21.description: Official 9-character GSS code for this 2021 Census MSOA.

lep1.title: LEP (Primary) GSS Code
lep1.description: Official 9-character GSS code for the primary Local Enterprise Partnership.

lep2.title: LEP (Secondary) GSS Code
lep2.description: Official 9-character GSS code for the secondary Local Enterprise Partnership.

result.description: Comprehensive location data including geographic coordinates, administrative boundaries, and electoral information for the requested postcode
Array containing detailed location information for the requested postcode or nearest postcodes

NearestPostcode.title: Geolocated Postcode
NearestPostcode.description: Standard postcode object extended with a distance attribute, indicating how far the postcode is from a supplied geolocation.

distance.title: Distance from supplied geolocation
distance.description: Distance in metres from specified postcode

result.description: Array of nearest postcodes sorted by distance

postcode.title: Postcode
postcode.description: UK postal code format that has been terminated. Follows the standard format of 2-4 character outward code, a space, then 3-character inward code.

year_terminated.title: Termination year
year_terminated.description: The year when the postcode was terminated (YYYY format).

month_terminated.title: Termination month
month_terminated.description: Month when the postcode was terminated (1-12, where 1=January, 12=December).

eastings.title: Eastings
eastings.description: OS National Grid easting (1m resolution). Null for postcodes without a grid reference (e.g. Channel Islands, Isle of Man) or that were terminated before a reference was assigned.

northings.title: Northings
northings.description: OS National Grid northing (1m resolution). Null for postcodes without a grid reference (e.g. Channel Islands, Isle of Man) or that were terminated before a reference was assigned.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: WGS84 longitude coordinate of the postcode location. Null if no grid reference is available.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: WGS84 latitude coordinate of the postcode location. Null if no grid reference is available.

result.description: Data for the requested terminated postcode.

ScottishPostcodes.description:
A Scottish postcode record sourced from the Scottish Postcode Directory (SPD).
Top-level fields hold the latest (canonical) value for each datapoint.
Year-suffixed fields hold prior versions where available. The `codes` block
mirrors the same datapoints with their GSS / official codes.

outcode.title: Outward Code
outcode.description: First part of the postcode (before the space).

incode.title: Inward Code
incode.description: Second part of the postcode (after the space).

postcode_sector.title: Postcode Sector
postcode_sector.description: Outward code plus the first character of the inward code.

user_type.title: User Type
user_type.description: SPD user-type indicator ("0" = small user, "1" = large user).

date_of_deletion.title: Date of Deletion
date_of_deletion.description: Date the postcode was deleted (YYYYMM). Null for live postcodes.

linked_small_user_postcode.title: Linked Small User Postcode
linked_small_user_postcode.description: For large-user postcodes, the linked small-user postcode (if any).

split_indicator.title: Split Indicator
split_indicator.description: SPD split indicator. Marks postcodes that span more than one administrative unit.

grid_link_indicator.title: Grid Link Indicator
grid_link_indicator.description: How the postcode was linked to its grid reference (1 = match by address, 2 = match by visual inspection, 3 = approximate match, etc.).

grid_link_positional_accuracy.title: Grid Link Positional Accuracy
grid_link_positional_accuracy.description: Positional accuracy of the grid reference.

council_area.title: Council Area
council_area.description: 2019 council area name. The current single-tier local authority.

registration_district.title: Registration District
registration_district.description: 2007 registration district code. (Names are not provided in SPD.)

strategic_development_planning_area.title: Strategic Development Planning Area
strategic_development_planning_area.description: 2013 SDPA code. Names are not provided in SPD.

local_government_district.title: Local Government District
local_government_district.description: 1995 local government district name (the most recent boundary before unitary council areas).

scottish_parliamentary_region.title: Scottish Parliamentary Region (2025)
scottish_parliamentary_region.description: 2025 Scottish Parliamentary region name (Second Review of Scottish Parliament Boundaries, SSI 2025/285, effective at the 7 May 2026 Holyrood election). This is the current designation.

scottish_parliamentary_region_2021.title: Scottish Parliamentary Region (2021)
scottish_parliamentary_region_2021.description: 2021 Scottish Parliamentary region name (superseded by the 2025 designation).

scottish_parliamentary_constituency.title: Scottish Parliamentary Constituency (2025)
scottish_parliamentary_constituency.description: 2025 Scottish Parliamentary constituency name (Second Review of Scottish Parliament Boundaries, SSI 2025/285, effective at the 7 May 2026 Holyrood election). This is the current designation.

scottish_parliamentary_constituency_2021.title: Scottish Parliamentary Constituency (2021)
scottish_parliamentary_constituency_2021.description: 2021 Scottish Parliamentary constituency name (superseded by the 2025 designation).

health_board_area.title: Health Board Area (2019)
health_board_area.description: 2019 NHS health board area name. Current operational boundary.

integration_authority.title: Integration Authority (2019)
integration_authority.description: 2019 health and social care integration authority name.

output_area.title: Output Area (2022)
output_area.description: 2022 census Output Area code. The smallest census geography.

data_zone.title: Data Zone (2022)
data_zone.description: 2022 Data Zone name. Scottish equivalent of LSOA.

intermediate_zone.title: Intermediate Zone (2022)
intermediate_zone.description: 2022 Intermediate Zone name. Scottish equivalent of MSOA.

civil_parish.title: Civil Parish (1930)
civil_parish.description: 1930 Scottish civil parish name (the latest historical baseline; civil parishes were abolished as administrative units in 1975).

island.title: Island
island.description: Island name where the postcode is located. "Mainland of Scotland" for non-island postcodes.

national_park.title: National Park (2010)
national_park.description: 2010 national park name (Cairngorms / Loch Lomond and the Trossachs). Null for non-park postcodes.

lau_level_1.title: Local Administrative Unit Level 1 (2025)
lau_level_1.description: 2025 LAU level 1 name. Replaces the previous NUTS classifications.

itl_level_2.title: International Territorial Level 2 (2025)
itl_level_2.description: 2025 ITL level 2 name. Mid-tier UK statistical geography (replaces NUTS 2).

itl_level_3.title: International Territorial Level 3 (2025)
itl_level_3.description: 2025 ITL level 3 name. The most granular ITL geography (replaces NUTS 3).

urban_rural_6_fold.title: Urban-Rural Classification (6-fold, 2022)
urban_rural_6_fold.description:
2022 Scottish Government 6-fold urban-rural classification code:

* 1: Large Urban Areas
* 2: Other Urban Areas
* 3: Accessible Small Towns
* 4: Remote Small Towns
* 5: Accessible Rural
* 6: Remote Rural

urban_rural_8_fold.title: Urban-Rural Classification (8-fold, 2022)
urban_rural_8_fold.description: 2022 Scottish Government 8-fold urban-rural classification code (1–8). Splits "Remote" categories into "Remote" and "Very Remote".

scottish_index_of_multiple_deprivation.title: Scottish Index of Multiple Deprivation (2020)
scottish_index_of_multiple_deprivation.description: SIMD 2020 rank for the postcode's Data Zone (1 = most deprived, 6976 = least deprived).

roa_community_planning_partnership.title: Community Planning Partnership (ROA 2006)
roa_community_planning_partnership.description: 2006 Community Planning Partnership name (Regional Outcome Agreement geography).

roa_local.title: Local Authority (ROA 2006)
roa_local.description: 2006 Regional Outcome Agreement local authority name.

census_household_count.title: Census Household Count (2022)
census_household_count.description: Number of households recorded against this postcode at the 2022 census. May be 0 for empty or zero-suppressed postcodes.

census_household_count_2011.title: Census Household Count (2011)
census_household_count_2011.description: Number of households recorded at the 2011 census.

census_household_count_2001.title: Census Household Count (2001)
census_household_count_2001.description: Number of households recorded at the 2001 census.

census_household_count_1991.title: Census Household Count (1991)
census_household_count_1991.description: Number of households recorded at the 1991 census.

census_population_count.title: Census Population Count (2022)
census_population_count.description: Resident population recorded against this postcode at the 2022 census.

census_population_count_2011.title: Census Population Count (2011)
census_population_count_2011.description: Resident population recorded at the 2011 census.

census_population_count_2001.title: Census Population Count (2001)
census_population_count_2001.description: Resident population recorded at the 2001 census.

census_population_count_1991.title: Census Population Count (1991)
census_population_count_1991.description: Resident population recorded at the 1991 census.

never_digitised.title: Never Digitised
never_digitised.description: True if the postcode has never been digitised (no grid reference established).

codes.title: Codes
codes.description: GSS / official codes for the corresponding name fields above.

council_area.title: Council Area Code (2019)
council_area.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2019 council area.

electoral_ward.title: Electoral Ward Code (2022)
electoral_ward.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2022 electoral ward.

local_government_district.title: Local Government District Code (1995)
local_government_district.description: Code for the 1995 local government district.

local_government_district_1991.title: Local Government District Code (1991)
local_government_district_1991.description: Code for the 1991 local government district.

uk_parliamentary_constituency.title: UK Parliamentary Constituency Code (2024)
uk_parliamentary_constituency.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2024 UK Parliamentary constituency.

scottish_parliamentary_region.title: Scottish Parliamentary Region Code (2025)
scottish_parliamentary_region.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2025 Scottish Parliamentary region (current designation).

scottish_parliamentary_region_2021.title: Scottish Parliamentary Region Code (2021)
scottish_parliamentary_region_2021.description: 9-character GSS code for the superseded 2021 Scottish Parliamentary region.

scottish_parliamentary_constituency.title: Scottish Parliamentary Constituency Code (2025)
scottish_parliamentary_constituency.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2025 Scottish Parliamentary constituency (current designation).

scottish_parliamentary_constituency_2021.title: Scottish Parliamentary Constituency Code (2021)
scottish_parliamentary_constituency_2021.description: 9-character GSS code for the superseded 2021 Scottish Parliamentary constituency.

health_board_area.title: Health Board Area Code (2019)
health_board_area.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2019 NHS health board area.

health_board_area_2006.title: Health Board Area Code (2006)
health_board_area_2006.description: GSS code for the 2006 health board area.

health_board_area_1995.title: Health Board Area Code (1995)
health_board_area_1995.description: Code for the 1995 health board area.

integration_authority.title: Integration Authority Code (2019)
integration_authority.description: 9-character GSS code for the 2019 integration authority.

data_zone.title: Data Zone Code (2022)
data_zone.description: GSS code for the 2022 Data Zone.

data_zone_2011.title: Data Zone Code (2011)
data_zone_2011.description: GSS code for the 2011 Data Zone.

intermediate_zone.title: Intermediate Zone Code (2022)
intermediate_zone.description: GSS code for the 2022 Intermediate Zone.

intermediate_zone_2011.title: Intermediate Zone Code (2011)
intermediate_zone_2011.description: GSS code for the 2011 Intermediate Zone.

travel_to_work_area.title: Travel to Work Area Code (2011)
travel_to_work_area.description: Code for the 2011 Travel to Work Area.

lau_level_1.title: LAU Level 1 Code (2025)
lau_level_1.description: Code for the 2025 LAU level 1 area.

itl_level_2.title: ITL Level 2 Code (2025)
itl_level_2.description: Code for the 2025 ITL level 2 area.

itl_level_3.title: ITL Level 3 Code (2025)
itl_level_3.description: Code for the 2025 ITL level 3 area.

strategic_development_planning_area.title: SDPA Code (2013)
strategic_development_planning_area.description: Code for the 2013 strategic development planning area.

roa_community_planning_partnership.title: Community Planning Partnership Code (ROA 2006)
roa_community_planning_partnership.description: Code for the 2006 community planning partnership.

roa_local.title: ROA Local Code (2006)
roa_local.description: Code for the 2006 ROA local authority.

result.description: Scottish Postcode Directory (SPD) data for the requested postcode.

outcode.title: Outcode
outcode.description: First part of the postcode before the space (e.g., "SW1A" in "SW1A 1AA"). Usually 2-4 characters.

eastings.title: Eastings
eastings.description: Ordnance Survey eastings coordinate (1m resolution). Returns 0 if location unavailable.

northings.title: Northings
northings.description: Ordnance Survey northings coordinate (1m resolution). Returns 0 if location unavailable.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: WGS84 longitude coordinate. May be null if location unavailable.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: WGS84 latitude coordinate. May be null if location unavailable.

parish.title: Parish
parish.description: Parishes (England) or communities (Wales) within this outcode.

parliamentary_constituency.title: Parliamentary Constituency
parliamentary_constituency.description: UK Parliamentary constituencies (July 2024 boundaries) that intersect this outcode.

result.description: Comprehensive geographical and administrative data for the specified outcode, including location coordinates, administrative boundaries, and related postal information

Place.title: Place
Place.description: A geographical location with detailed information including names, coordinates, and administrative boundaries

code.title: Code
code.description: Unique identifier for the place record (persistent except for Section of Named/Numbered Roads)

name_1.title: Primary Name
name_1.description: Official name of the place (preserves original format, e.g., "The Pennines" not "Pennines, The")

name_1_lang.title: Primary Name Language
name_1_lang.description: Language code for name_1 (cym=Welsh, eng=English, gla=Scottish Gaelic)

name_2.title: Secondary Name
name_2.description: Alternative name in a different language

name_2_lang.title: Secondary Name Language
name_2_lang.description: Language code for name_2 (cym=Welsh, eng=English, gla=Scottish Gaelic)

local_type.title: Local Type
local_type.description: Ordnance Survey classification (City, Town, Village, Hamlet, etc.)

outcode.title: Outcode
outcode.description: Postcode district (first part of the postcode)

county_unitary.title: Administrative Area
county_unitary.description: County, Unitary Authority or Greater London Authority that contains this place

county_unitary_type.title: Administrative Area Type
county_unitary_type.description: Type of administrative unit (e.g., County, UnitaryAuthority)

district_borough.title: District or Borough
district_borough.description: District, Metropolitan District or London Borough containing this place

region.title: Region
region.description: European Region (formerly Government Office Region) containing this place

country.title: Country
country.description: Country within Great Britain (England, Scotland, or Wales)

eastings.title: Eastings
eastings.description: Ordnance Survey grid reference Easting (1m resolution, not available for Channel Islands/Isle of Man)

northings.title: Northings
northings.description: Ordnance Survey grid reference Northing (1m resolution, not available for Channel Islands/Isle of Man)

min_eastings.title: Minimum Eastings
min_eastings.description: Western edge of the place's bounding box (Minimum Bounding Rectangle)

min_northings.title: Minimum Northings
min_northings.description: Southern edge of the place's bounding box (Minimum Bounding Rectangle)

max_eastings.title: Maximum Eastings
max_eastings.description: Eastern edge of the place's bounding box (Minimum Bounding Rectangle)

max_northings.title: Maximum Northings
max_northings.description: Northern edge of the place's bounding box (Minimum Bounding Rectangle)
